ownership.name: Shahid Khan
ownership.style: Patient owner; willing to invest in coaching and roster; backed rebuild and now expecting sustained success
ownership.tendencies: Hired entirely new coaching and GM staff in 2025; supported aggressive 2025 draft (Travis Hunter trade-up); expects playoffs

gm.name: James Gladstone
gm.philosophy: BPA approach — roster is good enough to not draft by need; values flexibility; willing to trade up or down; 'stay agile'
gm.analytics_approach: unverified — building his own scouting/analytics framework

head_coach.name: Liam Coen
head_coach.scheme_offense: Creative passing attack; RPOs; motion-heavy; developed into a top offense leading to 13-4 record and AFC South title
head_coach.scheme_defense: League's #1 run defense in 2025; DaVon Hamilton and Arik Armstead anchor interior

decision_makers.primary: James Gladstone (GM) and Liam Coen (HC) — aligned on BPA philosophy

roster_2026.qb_situation: Trevor Lawrence — franchise QB; 13-4 season validates the roster around him; Travis Hunter adds two-way star
key_signings: Travis Hunter (2025 #1 overall pick — WR/CB two-way player, traded up from CLE)
roster_2026.cap_space: unverified — playoff team with cap commitments

traded_away: Round 1 Pick 24 (to Cleveland in Travis Hunter trade-up)

needs.reason: Need to improve pass rush on both edge and interior; must build on league's #1 run defense with pass-rush complement
Need another tight end to pair with Brenton Strange; important position in Coen's offensive scheme
Lost Devin Lloyd to Panthers; need replacement linebacker to maintain defensive excellence
